Meet Your Doctor

Expertise You Can
Smile About

Dr. Bishal Ranjan Das brings over a decade of dedicated dental practice to BRDDENT Dental Care. With a patient-first philosophy and a commitment to using the latest technology, Dr. Das ensures every visit is comfortable, precise, and results-driven.

From routine check-ups to complex cosmetic transformations, his clinic in Jalukbari, Guwahati is equipped with modern diagnostic and treatment equipment to deliver world-class care right in your neighbourhood.

  • Cosmetic & Restorative Dentistry
  • Digital X-Ray Diagnostics
  • Implantology & Oral Surgery
  • Orthodontics & Braces
  • Paediatric Dental Care
  • Emergency Dental Services
What We Offer

Comprehensive
Dental Services

🦷

Dental Implants

Permanent, natural-looking tooth replacements using titanium implants fused with your jawbone for lifelong stability.

🔬

Root Canal

Pain-free root canal treatment to save infected or damaged teeth using modern rotary endodontics.

✨

Teeth Whitening

Professional in-clinic whitening that delivers visibly brighter, whiter teeth in a single comfortable session.

💎

Veneers & Crowns

Precision-crafted porcelain veneers and ceramic crowns for a flawless, camera-ready smile transformation.

🔗

Braces & Aligners

Metal braces and clear aligner options to correct misalignment, spacing and bite issues at any age.

🏥

Emergency Care

Same-day emergency appointments for toothache, trauma, broken teeth or sudden dental pain. We're here when it counts.
